basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology (MANIT), Bhopal
basic_details.short_information: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology (MANIT), Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) has published the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 on 09 July 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 01 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position. Candidates meeting the prescribed eligibility criteria and holding a BE/BTech or ME/MTech (or equivalent) in Electrical & Electronics Engineering/Electrical Engineering or a relevant allied branch with First Class at both UG and PG levels are eligible to apply through email at https://www.manit.ac.in/. The application process will be active from 09 July 2026 to

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: | BE/BTech or ME/MTech or equivalent in EEE/EE or allied branch relevant to the project with 1st class at both UG and PG level. | Preference: | ME/MTech in Power Electronics/Drives with GATE qualification. | Desirable: | Hands-on experience in modelling & simulation. Knowledge of MATLAB is desirable.

how_to_apply: Fill the prescribed Application Form (available with the advertisement).
Prepare detailed CV along with copies of educational certificates, GATE score (if any), experience, and publications.
Send all documents via email to [email protected] (PI) with a copy to [email protected].
Subject of the email should clearly mention the application for JRF position.
Only shortlisted candidates will be intimated for the interview.
important_instructions: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Continuation depends on satisfactory research performance. Selected candidates cannot claim regular/part-time appointment in the Institute. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal JRF Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: BE/BTech or ME/MTech or equivalent in EEE/EE or allied branch relevant to the project with 1st class at both UG and PG level. Preference: ME/MTech in Power Electronics/Drives with GATE qualification. Desirable: Hands-on experience in modelling & simulation. Knowledge of MATLAB is desirable.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MANIT Bhopal JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 24 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many JRF vacancies are available at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Junior Research Fellow under the MPCST project.

faq.question: Q3. What is the fellowship amount for JRF at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Rs. 20,000/- per month (consolidated, no HRA).

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility criteria for MANIT Bhopal MPCST JRF?
faq.answer: BE/BTech or ME/MTech in EEE/EE or allied branches with 1st class at UG and PG level.

faq.question: Q5. What is the project title for JRF position at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: “Prototyping of Solar PV based Microgrid with Novel Asymmetrical Multilevel Inverter for Rural Electrification”.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: Send the filled application form along with CV and documents to [email protected] on or before 24.07.2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is GATE qualification mandatory for MANIT Bhopal JRF?
faq.answer: GATE is not mandatory but preferred especially for ME/MTech in Power Electronics.

faq.question: Q8. What is the duration of the JRF project at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: The duration of the project is 11 months.

faq.question: Q9. Will selected JRF get any regular appointment at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: No, the position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form for MANIT Bhopal JRF MPCST 2026?
faq.answer: The application format is available with the official advertisement on the MANIT Bhopal website.
